content.text: all the passive income ideas that I talk
about in this video are things I built
in two years or less so these are all
income streams that you can build too
hey everyone it's your girl Rose welcome
back to my channel and today we're going
to talk about eight passive income ideas
that you can start building this year
these are all passive income streams
that I myself have built from scratch
and collectively bring in almost sixty
thousand dollars a month and in this
video I will share tips and ideas on how
you can do the same so let's get started
first up is dividends currently I make
about 235 dollars a month from dividends
so Dividends are when a company makes a
profit and then pays a portion of it out
to its owners so let's say you bought
one share of Apple stock that means you
own a tiny piece of the pie entitling
you do point zero zero zero zero zero
zero zero zero zero six percent of
Apple's profits for as long as you own
the stock the cool thing about it is
that Dividends are totally passive
there's a very qualified team in place
whose sole job is to run the company in
a way that maximizes profits for its
shareholders you you can just sit back
and collect dividends while somebody
else you know the CEO the CEO while the
management team does all the work the
first dividend payment I ever got was
from one share of McDonald's stock that
I bought when I was 14. it was just a
couple of cents I had no idea what I was
doing but still your first taste of
passive income is a feeling that you
will never forget to this day I set
aside a portion of my income every month
to invest into more dividend-paying
stocks because there's truly nothing
more motivating than purely passive
income dividend payments coming in so
how do you find stocks that pay a
dividend I will give you two ways first
you can just keep it simple and buy an
index fund or ETF in index funds or ETF
exchange traded funds is a stock that
mirrors the performance of a particular
market index such as the S P 500 or the
Dow Jones when you buy an index fund or
ETF you are purchasing shares in all of
the companies within that index these
are a few index funds and ETFs that I
own that pay reliable dividends sfkax BT
and QQQ also feel free to check out this
video here for a more detailed
explanation of index funds and ETFs if
you're feeling fancy another way to find
stocks that pay dividends is by using a
stock screener like finbiz.com I'll put
the link below and use it to pick out
stocks of individual companies so to
narrow down your search I recommend
going over here and screening for stocks
in one of these three major Market
indexes such as the S P 500 and to also
screen for stocks that pay a dividend
yield of 5 or higher so dividend yield
is a metric that tells you how big the
dividend is relative to the stock price
a high dividend yield means you get more
bang for your buck so for example if you
toggle over to the financial tab at T
has a dividend yield of 6.07 if you buy
one share of atnt at its current stock
price of 18.31 cents you get a 6.07
yield on your money or a dollar and 11
cents which means if you buy a thousand
shares you get a dividend payment of one
thousand one hundred and ten dollars now
please do your own research before
buying individual stocks because if you
pick a bad company and it goes out of
business you could lose all your money
so if you're a beginner at investing I
recommend sticking with index funds and
ETFs for that passive income all right
moving right along to my second passive
income Source interest which brings in
about 129 a month so interest is what
you receive in exchange for Lending
somebody money it's also what you pay
when you are in debt obviously it's a
lot better to be on the receiving side
of Interest than on the paying side one
of the first things I did on my
financial Journey was to save up an
emergency fund so this is where my
interest income first came from this
emergency fund had enough to cover me
for three months of living expenses it
was about ten thousand dollars and I
parked that money in a high interest
savings account at Capital One 360 where
I get paid interest every month and
depending on where interest rates are at
the time I'll get anywhere from two to
four percent so if you are also sitting
on a chunk of money say you're saving up
for a house or you have an emergency
fund and you won't need to touch this
money for a while why not turn that into
a passive income stream like today by
putting it into a high interest savings
account check out some of my links in
the description below for a list of
savings accounts that I like another way
to make interest income is with I bonds
I bonds are many loans that you make to
the US government in return for interest
sadly they were paying a fat 9.60 not
too long ago but recently went down to
about 6.8 which is still really good
interest from I bonds is also exempt
from state and city income taxes which
is pretty awesome if you live in a high
tax area like New York City or La the
only catch is you can only do up to ten
thousand dollars worth of I bonds at a
time which means the max amount of
passive income you can make with this is
689 a year but hey that's still
something you could buy I bonds at
treasurydirect.gov I will link to it
below now interest and dividends are
great forms of passive income because
they are really safe and easy but you
also need to invest a lot of money in
these things in order to generate enough
passive income to live off and really
make a difference in your life so let's
keep going and talk about other passive
income ideas that have much more
potential for growth next up is options
trading which brings in about a thousand
dollars a month for me on average I love
options trading because it's fun it's an
intellectually stimulating side hustle
that yields more income than you can get
with dividends and interest given the
same amount of money invested for
example in January I sold a put option
on coinbase which brought in about six
hundred dollars I closed the trade a
month later for a 500 profit the cool
thing is that I only needed four
thousand four hundred dollars of capital
to make this trade meaning that's the
amount of money that I had to risk this
is a 1211 return on Capital now is it as
easy as sitting back and collecting
interest and dividends no but there are
a lot of ways to automate your trading
so that it is largely passive not to
mention you can do it from bed in your
pajamas as long as it's during Market
hours I remember when I made twenty
dollars on my first trade and I was like
whoa it was a really awesome empowering
moment if options trading is something
you would like to try I recommend
focusing on learning just the four
trading strategies that generate
reliable consistent cash flow credit
spreads iron Condors covered calls and
cash secured puts that's it this will
shortcut the Steep learning curve by a
lot and make sure you don't get
overwhelmed by the whole world of
options trading out there if you want to
learn more about option trading I also
have a free YouTube series for beginners
if you want to check it out below my
next passive income Source idea is
YouTube you know those really annoying
video ads that you always skip when
you're watching YouTube so advertisers
actually pay a lot of money for these
ads and YouTube shares that money with
its creators via its YouTube Partner
program to start making passive income
with YouTube and to qualify for the
YouTube Partner program your channel
needs to get either 4 000 hours of watch
time or 1 000 subscribers whichever
happens first it took me a whole year to
get there but there are plenty of people
qualifying for the YouTube Partner
program within even a month of starting
their Channel as for how much you can
make my ad Revenue has been averaging
about 3500 hundred dollars a month but
I've also gotten as much as fifteen
thousand eight hundred thirty three
dollars of AD Revenue in a month the
sky's the limit though there are plenty
of YouTubers bringing in six figures a
month in ad Revenue alone so personally
I could do a lot better with this income
stream what's interesting though is that
even when I am not actively uploading
videos I still make ad revenue from old
videos that I made two to three years
ago for example during this four month
period when I wasn't posting these old
videos were still bringing in thousands
of dollars a month that's when I
realized the difference between spending
a thousand hours building in assets like
a YouTube channel versus spending a
thousand hours trading your time for
money at a job even though during the
year that it took me to build my YouTube
channel I could have gone out and gotten
a job that paid me say a hundred
thousand dollars this asset that I built
during that year now brings in a hundred
thousand dollars for me passively and it
will do that for years and years to come
everybody wants passive income these
days but you gotta remember you have to
be willing to pay the cost of some time
doing a lot of work for free up front so
that you can reap major benefits later
now if you're interested in starting a
YouTube channel of your own spend some
time thinking about these three things
one what am I good at two what am I so
passionate about that I can talk about
it 24 7 and make videos about it every
single week without getting sick of it
and three what would people find
valuable so find something that fills
all three of these criteria and make
videos about that for example my family
have gone through so much due to money
problems so when I started my whole
financial journey I wanted to tell
everybody about it and tell everyone
about what I was learning I wanted other
people to feel the empowerment that I
felt and that's what got me over my fear
of getting on camera and starting my
channel so I want you to find something
that you care about so much that it'll
get you over your fear of failure your
fear of looking back and your analysis
paralysis I guarantee you if you dig
deep into your story there's something
there next up is affiliate marketing
affiliate marketing income is when you
get paid commissions promoting other
people's products for example Amazon has
an awesome affiliate program that anyone
can join at any time once you join you
can create personalized links to
products that you like and if someone
clicks on your link and buys Amazon has
a way of tracking that sale back to you
and paying your commission for it
honestly I was skeptical at first but
when I started gaining traction on my
YouTube channel I put my Amazon
affiliate links in the description of a
YouTube video where I was talking about
my favorite personal finance books of
all time and in the video I told people
to check out the links if they wanted to
read those books a month later I got my
first payout from Amazon in my bank
account then the next month I got 561
the next it was 547 the next day was 834
dollars nowadays I'm not putting as much
effort into this income stream and it's
bringing in probably like a hundred
dollars a month but what I love about
this income stream is that it feels so
natural you know how if you love
something such as a skincare product
that made your pimples go away or a
gadget that you can't live without you
know how you just tell all your friends
about it that's basically what this is
except that you're getting paid for it
the other requirement for making passive
income in affiliate marketing is to have
somewhere on the internet that gets
traffic and eyeballs I have my affiliate
links in my Instagram bio my website my
YouTube videos everywhere online
basically you can place money making
affiliate links anywhere that gets
traffic and eyeballs and the more
traffic and eyeballs and therefore the
more clicks and sales that you make the
more income you make the trick here is
to create interesting entertaining or
informative content that people want to
watch read or listen to that's how you
get traffic and eyeballs so it's very
much about how creative you are and how
much value you can provide for people
through your content in that sense there
is no barrier to entry other than hard
work and the ability to come up with
good content this is another one of
those passive income streams that takes
some work to get off the ground but is
later on infinitely scalable I only make
a couple hundred a month in affiliate
income but my fellow YouTuber friend
Charlie Chang makes sometimes up to six
figure years a month in affiliate income
so truly the sky's the limit with this
one all right next up is online courses
for me it makes an average of 50 000 a
month I have two courses one about Index
Fund investing and another one about
options trading although I talk about
these things for free in my YouTube
videos when someone watches my YouTube
videos and wants to go even deeper on
the topic they buy my courses so the key
to making passive income with online
courses is to first come up with a
course that people will want to pay for
more on that in a second and then the
next is to automate everything using
software for example when someone signs
up for one of my free pdf resources they
immediately get an email with the
download and then they also get a series
of emails that tells them more about my
options trading course at any given
point if they click on the course link
and buy they then get an automated email
with information on how to access their
course and I get a sales notification in
my email inbox as well every part of the
system is automated and I make sales day
in and day out while I'm getting my
nails done while I'm sleeping Etc this
type of system is called a sales funnel
and learning how to build automated
sales funnels is one of the most
powerful things I have ever done if
you'd like to build an online course of
your own go back to that Venn diagram
that I showed you earlier what am I good
at what am I passionate about and what
would people find valuable whether it's
about how you overcame shyness how to
meal prep as a vegan how to pair wines
with food how to learn a language the
possibilities are truly endless but the
key is to First believe that you have
something of value to offer because you
do people are buying online courses to
solve their problems and learn something
new every single day I used to think
everyone knew about index funds because
it came so easily to me but when I
realized I knew stuff people didn't and
that I could explain it in a way that
really helps them I monetize it and that
online course has made me almost half a
million dollars to this day completely
passively the thing about building all
these passive income streams is that
these are skills that I didn't initially
have I didn't know how to create an
online course I didn't know how to build
a sales funnel but I learned all these
skills and these are skills you can
learn too if you want to create a
financial reality for yourself that has
never existed before it's empowering to
know that the only thing standing
between you and your new Financial
reality is a set of skills skills that
you can learn skills are the gap between
you and 10 50 100 000 a month in passive
income and it is a gap that you can
Bridge just like I did my next passive
income idea is rental property and
before you click out and say oh I don't
have enough to buy rental property hang
on because in just a minute I'll share
with you how you can invest in real
estate with as little as 100 personally
rental income brings in just under three
thousand dollars a month for me in
passive income it's completely passive
because if there's any broken toilets or
leaky faucets my tenants call my
property manager not me I just sit back
and collect rent basically I have three
single family homes in Las Vegas and as
for how I found the properties last year
I was driving through Vegas in my camper
van I had actually been sitting on some
money that I wanted to invest so when I
found these deals within 60 days I
closed on all three of them and I
actually felt really confident about
closing on all these deals because up to
that point I had been studying real
estate for years so I kind of knew a
good deal when I saw it which is why
years later when I finally had enough
money to invest I didn't blink an eye
when I found the deals I moved quickly
so remember when we talked about skills
learning new skills closes the gap
between where you are and where you want
to be and analyzing real estate deals
and finding good deals is a skill that
you can learn too if you want to get
into property investing the first step
is to identify a city or neighborhood
that you want to invest in the next step
is to build a relationship with a good
broker in that area and have them start
sending you listings then as you're
analyzing each listing ask yourself
these four questions one what rent can
you charge for a property like this two
how big is the mortgage payment three
what are the month the expenses like
taxes insurance and repairs four how
easy is it to rent this property out and
to keep it rented if there's good rental
demand in that area and the rent is high
enough to cover all those expenses and
leave you with a positive cash flow it's
a good deal I'll be sharing more behind
the scenes about my rental properties
soon and all the number crunching behind
it so be sure to subscribe to my channel
if you haven't already because there's a
lot more coming your way if you don't
have enough money for a down payment or
a property then you can look into these
two options that cost a lot less money
to look into REITs real estate
investment trusts which are basically
shares in a company that owns income
producing real estate just think of it
as real estate stocks and it's one way
to get your foot in the door without
having a lot of money for example vnq
which is vanguard's Reit index funds
only costs about eighty dollars a share
which means you can own a piece of a
very large real estate portfolio run by
Vanguard for just eighty dollars you can
also look into crowdfunded real estate
Investments such as funrise these are
very similar to wreaths I recently threw
a couple thousand dollars into fundrise
just to check it out so I'll keep you
posted on how that goes too but
essentially you can also own shares of
large real estate portfolios with a very
small investment okay and finally for my
last passive income idea campervan
rentals so personally I started renting
out my camper van late last year on
outdoorsy.com outdoorsy.com is kind of
like an Airbnb for campers and RVs I
know this is a really kind of out of the
box idea I know most people think about
airbnbs but they don't really think
about outdoorsy.com but what I like
about this is that you can buy a small
vehicle like a van or an old Airstream
or an RV and if you're pretty handy you
can fix it up and rent it out for as
high as 100 200 or even three four
hundred dollars a night when I first
heard about outdoorsy.com the number is
just kind of blew me away I was like you
can buy a van or an RV and rent it out
at hotel nightly rates without spending
the money to actually build a whole
hotel so I actually have a camper van
that I was living in for most of last
year and I tried this out I rented out
on outdoorsy I had two bookings and made
1520 which is pretty good but according
to Outdoors you can earn over 50 000 a
year doing this now you do have to meet
the renter at pickup and delivery you
have to arrange cleanings and answer
questions for bookings but theoretically
If you hired someone to manage the
rental for you this could become totally
passive so if you're pretty handy you
could consider fixing up an old RV or a
van and running an outdoorsy rental
business kind of like an Airbnb business
but with homes on Wheels if you really
want to take this further you could even
buy a whole Fleet of RVs or a whole
Fleet of Vans and run a whole business
from this the key would be to be able to
find vehicles that you can fix up
cheaply but also make them look really
appealing to renters personally I'm not
good at stuff like that but if you are
then definitely look into this as a
passive income idea if there's anything
that you take away from this video I
hope it gives you the idea that there
are a lot of ways to make passive income
so I really want you to think about
which ones that you would enjoy building
and which ones would leverage your
strengths one last word of encouragement
making passive income is hard only in
the beginning but once you have
something going some passive income
stream going you start creating Surplus
that frees you up from having to work
all the time it frees up time and money
and that gives you a lot of space to go
and build more passive income streams so
it creates this really powerful flywheel
effect that gets easier and easier but
it's just hard only in the beginning
that is it for today I really hope this
video has given you ideas that you can

I'll see you guys next week same time
same place bye
